name: Digital Hazard Seal
effect: Once as a Basic Action, apply this seal to one Digimon — ally or enemy — within 1 space. If applied to an ally it suppresses one status effect affecting them for two rounds (does not remove it — suspends it). If applied to an enemy make a Sincerity check DN 12. On a success the enemy's attack bonus is reduced by 2 for two rounds. On a failure the seal has no effect. The seal crumbles after use.
notes: Ally: suspends 1 status effect for 2 rounds. Enemy: Sincerity DN 12, -2 attack for 2 rounds on success. Range 1. Single use.
